heading: Opposition to loans or funds for countries that support terrorism
label: 262p–11 Opposition to loans or funds for countries that support terrorism
text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall instruct the United States Executive Director at each of the International Financial Institutions (as defined in ) to use the voice and vote of the United States to oppose the provision of loans or other use of the funds of the respective institution to any country the government of which the Secretary of State has determined, for purposes of section 4605(j) of title 50, , or , to be a government that has repeatedly provided support for acts of international terrorism.1section 262r(c)(2) of this title2section 2371 of this titlesection 2780 of this titleSo in original. Probably should not be capitalized.1See References in Text note below.2
